core.description: Shared authentication (JWT), RBAC, i18n, and Audit logging.

landing_page.description: Modern front door for Al Rayes Laundry; gateways to IT and Laundry portals.

it_portal.description: Asset Management, Infra Monitor, Secret Vault, and Ticketing.

laundry_portal.description: Order Lifecycle, Driver Logistics, CRM, and Pricing.

database.description: Multi-tenant PostgreSQL standards with specialized Windows dev stage support.

migrations.description: Transitioned to PostgreSQL and implemented universal OS support via Docker.
Optimized environment for Windows-first development stage with PowerShell automation.
